title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, an Associate Professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI by hand at human speed and focusing on mathematical foundations builds skills resilient to hype cycles. He contends that people, not AI, are the force for meaningful change.
